landing.headline: Ship Persian SaaS that looks bought, not assembled.
landing.subheadline: A commercial foundation with editorial UI, true RTL, and modules you can sell from day one.
landing.featuresTitle: The stack that replaces your next six weeks
landing.featuresSubtitle: Design system, tables, auth, and mock data — wired for production patterns, not demos.
landing.benefitsTitle: Built for teams that ship products
landing.benefitsSubtitle: Outcomes that matter when you sell SaaS to real clients.
landing.benefitShipDesc: Mock API, optimistic updates, and empty states let you present a finished application while the backend is still being decided.
landing.benefitRtlTitle: Own the Persian market without mirrored layouts
landing.benefitRtlDesc: Locale change flips the entire chrome — sidebar, drawers, tables, and forms — with Vazirmatn and logical CSS baked in.
landing.benefitScaleDesc: Users, products, orders, and settings plug into nav, commands, and permissions without rewriting the shell.
landing.uiShowcaseSubtitle: Floating shell, calm density, and Atlas Editorial tokens — distinct from generic admin themes.
landing.uiPoint1: Asymmetrical dashboard widgets instead of equal card grids
landing.uiPoint2: Data tables with search, filters, sort, and bulk actions
landing.uiPoint3: Drawers, command palette, and auth flows that match the shell
landing.rtlShowcaseTitle: RTL and LTR as first-class modes
landing.rtlShowcaseSubtitle: Not a translation layer. Direction changes every interaction surface.
landing.rtlShowcaseNote: Switch language in the header to feel the full layout mirror — this page included.
landing.themeShowcaseSubtitle: Soft light surfaces and deep charcoal night mode — never pure black or flat white.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Marketplace-ready packages for freelancers, product teams, and agencies.
landing.docsCtaTitle: Documentation that ships with the kit
landing.docsCtaSubtitle: Tokens, architecture rules, RTL guidance, and how to register the next module.
landing.faqSubtitle: Straight answers for agencies and founders evaluating the kit.
landing.faq1a: No — everything runs on a Mock API so you can ship UI first, then swap services without rewriting features.
landing.faq2q: Does Persian switch the layout to RTL?
landing.faq2a: Yes. Sidebar, tables, forms, drawers, and notifications mirror natively when the locale is fa.
landing.faq3q: Can I add Reports or CRM later?
landing.faq3a: Register a feature module — nav, commands, and permissions wire in without shell rewrites.
landing.faq4a: Commercial marketplace license with full source access for your products and client deliverables.
landing.faq5a: Yes. Light, dark, and system themes use Atlas Editorial surfaces — premium charcoal, never pure black.
landing.faq6q: How fast can we start a client project?
landing.faq6a: Clone, set locale, open the demo, and white-label tokens. Most teams present a branded shell within a day.
landing.testimonialsTitle: Trusted by teams shipping in Persian
landing.testimonialsSubtitle: From agencies to founders building paid SaaS.
landing.t1quote: Finally an RTL kit that feels premium, not like a mirrored Bootstrap theme.
landing.t2quote: The module registry saved us weeks. We plugged billing without touching layout code.
landing.t3quote: Whitespace, floating chrome, and typography — it looks handcrafted, not generated.
landing.contactTitle: Talk to us about licenses & custom builds
landing.contactSubtitle: Agency seats, white-label packaging, or help shipping your first module — we reply within one business day.
landing.contactNote: Include your workspace size and target launch date.
landing.footerRights: © 2026 Persian SaaS Starter Kit Pro. Built for marketplace sale.
landing.planStarterDesc: Single commercial project with the core modules.
landing.planProDesc: Unlimited projects and the full Atlas Editorial kit.
landing.planAgencyDesc: Team seats, priority updates, and client redistribution.
landing.planProF4: Lifetime updates for the major version
landing.featureDesignDesc: Tokens, surfaces, and primitives tuned for editorial SaaS — floating shell included.
landing.featureRtlDesc: Logical layout that mirrors with the locale — not a translated LTR skin.
landing.featureMockDesc: Hundreds of realistic records with delay, CRUD, and empty states ready for demos.
landing.featureModulesDesc: Register nav, widgets, and permissions without refactoring the application shell.
landing.featureCmdkDesc: Ctrl+K search across pages, records, and settings — production interaction patterns.
landing.featureAuthDesc: Login, register, OTP, reset, and two-factor UI ready to brand for your product.
